chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.S- 498 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 07.07.2014. Mr. Inderjeet Lohano, Advocate for pertitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Nabhi Kazi, Assistant A.G. a/w SIP Muhammad Changal on behalf of SSP, Hyderabad and ASI Manzoor Jamali on behalf of SHO Naseem Nagar. = Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that at the instance of private respondents, the official respondents are causing harassment to the petitioner. Learned A.A.G. present in Court has filed comments of respondent No.1 in which they have denied to have caused any kind of harassment to the petitioner. It has further been stated in the comments that there is a matrimonial dispute going on between the parties. In the comments however, respondent No.1 has undertaken to provide legal protection to the petitioner at the time of need, which has satisfied the counsel for the petitioner. In terms of above, the petition stands disposed of with direction to the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioner and ensure that no harassment is caused to her. JUDGE
